response.original_title: Il teatro di Mattia Torre : Qui e ora
response.overview: A head-on collision between two scooters on a remote road on the outskirts of Rome. It is June 2, a national holiday, and emergency responders are slow to arrive. The two men lying on the ground are anthropologically irreconcilable opposites, destined to hate one another.
response.title: Il teatro di Mattia Torre : Qui e ora
